articles.description: 'No such offer has been made by the Oil Marketing Companies, and there is no proposal for export of E20 petrol to Bhutan,' says the Ministry of Petroleum and Natural Gas

articles.title: After E20 petrol, Nitin Gadkari pushes for 15% isobutanol-blended diesel: What it is and why it matters
articles.description: India may soon allow up to 15% isobutanol blending in diesel. Here's what isobutanol is, why Nitin Gadkari is backing it, and how it could reduce fuel imports.

articles.title: Tesla, BYD to Tata Motors: How should Indian investors play the EV theme? Experts explain the right strategy
articles.description: Gas prices surged, prompting questions about investing in EV stocks like Tesla. However, valuations may not align with sales. Experts advise focusing on long-term EV adoption trends and diversifying investments rather than reacting to short-term fuel price spikes.

articles.title: Ban on non-EV 2-wheeler, registration needed to clear city air: CM Rekha Gupta on Delhi EV Policy 2.0
articles.description: NEW DELHI: Chief minister Rekha Gupta on Saturday defended Delhi govt’s decision to stop fresh registrations of petrol-powered two-wheelers from April.

articles.title: Petrol, diesel prices today - 5 July: Latest fuel rates in Delhi, Mumbai, Bengaluru, Kolkata, Hyderabad, other cities
articles.description: Fuel prices in India remained stable on 5 July despite falling global crude prices. Oil Marketing Companies are not expected to cut domestic prices soon.

articles.title: E20 rollout fuels demand for premium petrol amid mileage, engine concerns
articles.description: As E20 becomes the default fuel across India, a growing number of motorists are opting for higher-octane petrol amid concerns that E20 could hurt mileage and engine performance.

articles.title: A Week of Twists in US: From Highways to Headlines
articles.description: The week in the US was marked by diverse news events.
